name: wikipedia-search
description: Keyless encyclopedic search over Wikipedia: ranked articles with intro-extract snippets. No API key — uses the public MediaWiki API. Links-only (web_fetch an article to read its full body). Best for factual/reference lookups.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Language
x-meta.help: Wikipedia language edition to search (e.g. en, de, fr, ja).

x-meta.label: Request Timeout
x-meta.help: Maximum seconds to wait for a search response.
